Who is this for: Content creators, marketing managers, communications specialists, product managers, developers, designers, copywriters, social media managers, brand managers, creative directors
Team or Dept this is for: Legal, Marketing, Communications, Product Development, Creative Services, Brand Management, Content Strategy, IT
Description: Ownership, reuse, and legal concerns of AI-generated content.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with how your organisation uses digital tools and content, along with a general awareness of what artificial intelligence is, is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key intellectual property risks associated with AI-generated content and explain how ownership and copyright laws apply in a corporate context. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to assess and manage the legal concerns around reusing AI-generated materials within your organisation.
